# Instagram Post — OpenAI Winds Down Sora to Prioritize 'Spud' — Compute Economics Force Strategic Retreat
# Week: Week of 2026-03-23
# Brand Voice: GYanTech AI — Visionary, executive audience, lead generation
# Status: Review before posting

---

OpenAI just killed its own product to survive.

Sora — the AI video generator that stunned the world — is gone. Not because it failed creatively. Because inference costs per generated minute were unsustainable.

Every GPU-hour OpenAI spent running Sora was a GPU-hour not spent on Spud, the next frontier model Sam Altman says ships in weeks. So they made the call.

This is the decision every executive will face in 2026. You have AI features in production. Some are delivering real value. Others look impressive in demos but are quietly bleeding compute budget.

The companies that win are not the ones with the most AI — they are the ones whose AI survives a cost audit.

OpenAI just showed what that discipline looks like at the highest level. The question is whether your organization has the same clarity.

GYanTech AI builds AI strategies where capability and economics align from day one. Link in bio.
